metadata.title: Free DnD Backstory Generator | D&D 5e Character Lore
metadata.description: DnD Backstory Generator for D&D 5e and 5.5e players and DMs. Build playable character backstories with traits, ideals, bonds, flaws, secrets, and three actionable DM hooks in every output.
metadata.keywords: DnD Backstory Generator, D&D backstory generator, D&D character backstory, 5e backstory, NPC backstory, DM hooks, DnD character generator

ui.title: DnD Backstory Generator
ui.subtitle: Build a playable D&D 5e or 5.5e character backstory with flaws, bonds, secrets, and DM hooks.

placeholders.character_concept: Describe the D&D character you want to build... (e.g. 'A tiefling warlock hiding a pact debt from the party')
placeholders.core_motivation: What drives this character right now?
placeholders.flaw_or_fear: What weakness, fear, or bad habit haunts them?
placeholders.important_bond: Who or what matters most to them?
placeholders.world_notes: Any setting, city, region, or campaign lore to respect
placeholders.party_role: e.g. frontline tank, party face, scout
placeholders.deity_patron_oath: Optional deity, patron, oath, or creed
placeholders.rival_faction: Optional enemy, rival, or faction tie
placeholders.extra_constraints: Extra instructions for tone, lore, or table use

output.title: Generated DnD Backstory
output.empty_message: Your structured DnD backstory will appear here with traits, flaws, bonds, secrets, and DM hooks.

random_prompts: A tiefling warlock who owes a debt to a cursed archfey and hides it from the party
A dwarf fighter sworn to recover a clan relic before a rival mercenary company claims it
An aasimar cleric whose healing powers returned only after a village burned under their watch
A halfling rogue who stole from the wrong thieves' guild and now travels under a false name
A human paladin whose oath is starting to conflict with the corrupt order that trained them
A wood elf ranger tracking the same monstrous beast that once destroyed their border settlement

feature_intro.name: feature_intro
feature_intro.label: Overview
feature_intro.title: What Is a DnD Backstory Generator?
feature_intro.description:
A DnD Backstory Generator helps you turn a rough fantasy character idea into a playable D&D profile. Instead of writing a long novel-style biography, this DnD Backstory Generator focuses on what players and DMs actually use at the table: a clear origin, strong motivation, meaningful bonds, visible flaws, hidden secrets, and DM hooks that can become quests or conflicts.

This DnD Backstory Generator is built for D&D 5e and 5.5e style play. You can guide the result with race, class, background, alignment, tone, hook type, and extra lore notes, then get a structured backstory that is easy to drop into a campaign, session zero, or NPC roster.

feature_benefits.name: feature_benefits
feature_benefits.label: Benefits
feature_benefits.title: Why Use This DnD Backstory Generator
feature_benefits.description: This DnD Backstory Generator is designed for playability, not just flavor text.

items.title: Playable Structure
items.description: This DnD Backstory Generator outputs traits, ideals, bonds, flaws, secrets, and DM hooks in a format players and DMs can skim fast during prep or play.

items.title: Better Hooks for Campaigns
items.description: Every DnD Backstory Generator result includes actionable DM hooks, making it easier to connect your character to factions, quests, rivals, and session zero relationships.

items.title: Useful for PCs and NPCs
items.description: Use the DnD Backstory Generator for player characters, villains, side NPCs, or recurring quest givers without having to rewrite the whole structure every time.

image.alt: DnD backstory for players and NPCs

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the DnD Backstory Generator
how_to_use.description: Create a playable D&D character backstory in three focused steps.

items.title: Choose Your Character Shell
items.description: Pick a race, class, and background, then describe the core character concept you want this DnD Backstory Generator to expand.

items.title: Add Playable Details
items.description: Set the campaign tone, use case, alignment, and optional details like motivation, flaw, bond, secret, deity, rival, or faction ties.

items.title: Generate Hooks for the Table
items.description: Generate your result and use the structured output for session zero, character sheets, NPC prep, or DM plot hooks.

feature_section.name: applications
feature_section.label: Use Cases
feature_section.title: Who Should Use This DnD Backstory Generator
feature_section.description: Built for D&D tables that want richer characters without slowing down prep.

items.title: New Players
items.description: Use this DnD Backstory Generator to go from a simple race-and-class idea to a complete playable concept with flaws, goals, and party-friendly hooks.

items.title: Experienced Roleplayers
items.description: If you already know the vibe you want, this DnD Backstory Generator helps you stress-test motivation, secrets, and campaign fit before the first session.

items.title: Dungeon Masters
items.description: Dungeon Masters can use the DnD Backstory Generator to produce NPCs, villains, allies, cult leaders, mentors, and rumor-ready quest hooks much faster.

faq_section.name: faq
faq_section.label: FAQ
faq_section.title: DnD Backstory Generator FAQs
faq_section.description: Common questions about using a DnD Backstory Generator for D&D 5e and 5.5e campaigns.

items.title: What makes this DnD Backstory Generator different from a normal backstory tool?
items.description: This DnD Backstory Generator is built around what D&D players and DMs actually need: traits, ideals, bonds, flaws, goals, secrets, and usable DM hooks. It is not just a generic fantasy biography writer.

items.title: Can I use this DnD Backstory Generator for NPCs and villains?
items.description: Yes. You can switch the use case from player character to NPC or villain, and the DnD Backstory Generator will shape the motivation, relationship tension, and hooks to fit that role.

items.title: Does the DnD Backstory Generator work for D&D 5e and 5.5e?
items.description: Yes. This DnD Backstory Generator is written for the common D&D 5e and 5.5e style of play, while avoiding overly rigid rules text so it still works across many homebrew tables.

items.title: Will the DnD Backstory Generator create DM hooks automatically?
items.description: Yes. Every DnD Backstory Generator output includes three actionable DM hooks that can become scenes, quests, rivalries, secrets, or faction problems inside a campaign.

items.title: How long should a good D&D backstory be?
items.description: For most tables, shorter and more playable is better. A strong D&D backstory should tell the DM who the character is, what they want, what can hurt them, and what hooks the campaign can pull. This DnD Backstory Generator is designed around that principle.
